desc:
Forest Treasure Map #1 dig site: go to Point Pleasant. The bridge on the treasure map is not the big bridge that spans the river but a smaller one further south, which leads over a smaller river that flows into the big one. When you have found the bridge, jump down south of it, look to the north where you will see a mound. Here you will find the treasure.
Grid B7 (X: 793, Y: 2516)
